outputContract.description: Target unit inventory with unitId, type, name, and capability status.
hints: Use unitId for subsequent tool params.

outputContract.description: Sheet names, used ranges, bounded normalized samples, candidate non-empty regions, formulas, and truncation warnings.
hints: regions are candidate non-empty rectangles, not final business semantics.
warnings explain truncation or skipped region scans.

outputContract.description: Known-rectangle evidence. Slim cell facts by default; optional exact values, displayValues, formulas, numberFormats, semanticStyles, cellData, valueDetails, and cell-level facts for one or more explicit ranges.
hints: ranges groups evidence per caller-specified rectangle and preserves matrix dimensions.
cell facts include A1 coordinates and selected value/display/formula/format/style fields.
cell fact value fields use cellData.v/raw readback for typed values; valueType prefers cellData.t when available; displayValue mirrors Facade getDisplayValues().
semanticStyles exposes supported stable traits only and never uses raw style ids.

outputContract.description: Readonly spreadsheet conditional formatting rule facts: original A1 ranges, raw range bounds, condition config, style config, order/priority/stop-if-true when available, and unsupported-rule warnings. It does not compute final rendered styles.
hints: ranges preserves original rule targets as A1 and raw zero-based range bounds.
intersectsRequestedRange means the original rule target overlaps the requested rangeA1.
rule style facts are rule resources, not guaranteed effective cell styles.

outputContract.description: Matched normalized values by default with sheetName, A1 coordinates, matched value type, and optional neighborhood evidence.
hints: matchedType tells whether the match came from normalized values, formulas, or another requested evidence type.
neighborhood evidence is contextual and bounded; use sheet-range for a deliberate final rectangle.

outputContract.description: Expanded normalized range evidence around an anchor cell or range.
hints: rangeA1 in the output is the expanded bounded range actually read.
normalized values are for context; request exact include fields when required.

outputContract.description: Formula cells with values and optional neighboring labels.
hints: Formula coordinates are returned as A1 plus zero-based row/column indexes.
Neighbor labels are hints, not semantic proof; inspect the relevant range before editing.
